experience_chunks.description: Implemented streaming data pipelines on Kafka and Spark Streaming for a real-time user-activity processing platform at Mindtree.
Built and maintained data pipelines on Apache Airflow processing ~500GB of daily transactional data across 12 source systems at Dunder Mifflin.

axis_embeddings.text: [{"id":"chunk_1","description":"Led customer support team at Wipro, managed a team of 8 support agents, owned escalation process, and built support knowledge base.","tags":["team_lead","customer_support","process_owner"]},{"id":"chunk_2","description":"Worked on mechanical engineering design role at Wipro, led design of two product subsystems, and worked with manufacturing partners.","tags":["engineering_design","product_development","manufacturing"]},{"id":"chunk_3","description":"Content writing and SEO strategy for a tech-focused publication, managed freelance writer pool, and used AI-assisted content production tools.","tags":["content_writing","SEO","AI-assisted_content"]}]

experience_chunks.description: Led customer support team at Wipro, managed a team of 8 support agents, owned escalation process, and built support knowledge base.
Worked on mechanical engineering design role at Wipro, led design of two product subsystems, and worked with manufacturing partners.
Content writing and SEO strategy for a tech-focused publication, managed freelance writer pool, and used AI-assisted content production tools.
